# Devansh Tiwari

> AI Product Builder. I ship AI products end-to-end, from user research to production.

## About

Devansh Tiwari is an AI Product Builder who sits at the intersection of product management and engineering. He has shipped 50+ products, founded 2 companies, and worked across e-commerce personalization, fintech, and AI.

Currently co-founding Metis (trymetis.app), an AI-powered stock analysis tool for Indian swing traders. Previously co-founded Zashit, an AI credit card reward optimizer. Completing NextLeap Product Manager Fellowship (Jan-Apr 2026).

## Experience

- Co-Founder @ Metis (Feb 2026 - Present): AI-powered stock analysis for Indian swing traders. Shipped 0-to-1 in 20 days. 7 free tools targeting 650K+ monthly searches. Reduced API cost by 52%.
- Software Engineer (Product-Facing) @ Helium (Apr 2024 - Aug 2025): E-commerce personalization. 20-30% merchant sales uplift. 60% latency reduction. Led product discovery for conversational commerce.
- Co-Founder & Product Engineer @ Zashit (Feb 2025 - Jun 2025): AI credit card reward optimizer. 50+ waitlist signups. Built OCR pipeline for transaction extraction.
- Freelance Software Engineer @ OSIT (Jun 2024 - Dec 2025): 8 products across 5 domains for Saudi Arabia. 25-module platform in 4 weeks.
- Freelance Full Stack Developer (2022-2024): 50+ global clients. 2L/month at peak.

## Skills

Product: Product Discovery, User Research, PRDs, RICE Prioritization, Competitive Analysis, Go-to-Market, MVP Scoping
Technical: TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, OpenAI/LLM
Analytics: SQL, PostHog, Funnel Analytics (AARRR), OKRs/KPIs
